raw_cv_text:
Sven Kramer
sven.kramer@gmail.com • +1-206-447-8923 • https://github.com/svenk-infra
EDUCATION
University of Washington | B.S. Computer Science 2010 - 2014
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Staff DevOps Engineer Jan 2021 - Present
Architected and deployed multi-region Kubernetes infrastructure serving 400+ microservices, reducing latency by 34% and
improving availability to 99.99% SLA across production environments
Led cross-functional platform engineering team of 6 engineers, establishing IaC standards and mentoring 3 junior engineers
on infrastructure design patterns, resulting in 45% faster onboarding time
Designed and implemented automated disaster recovery solution using Terraform and custom Go orchestration tools, reducing
mean recovery time from 8 hours to 12 minutes for critical payment processing systems
Shopify | Senior DevOps Engineer Jun 2018 - Dec 2020
Migrated 200+ services from EC2 to containerized ECS architecture, reducing infrastructure costs by $2.1M annually while
improving deployment frequency from weekly to 50+ daily releases
Implemented GitOps workflow using ArgoCD across 12 development teams, automating 95% of manual deployment
processes and reducing production incident response time by 60%
Built comprehensive observability platform integrating Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack for 15K+ monitoring endpoints,
enabling real-time alerting and reducing MTTR by 40 minutes on average
Databricks | Lead Infrastructure Engineer Mar 2016 - May 2018
Designed and operationalized multi-cloud strategy supporting AWS, GCP, and Azure, enabling 3 new enterprise customer
deployments and generating $8M incremental ARR
Established infrastructure-as-code standards using Terraform and Ansible, reducing manual configuration drift incidents by
89% and cutting infrastructure provisioning time from 4 weeks to 3 days
Mentored team of 4 engineers on Kubernetes architecture and networking, facilitating 12 internal knowledge-sharing sessions
that improved team velocity and reduced critical incident resolution time by 35%
Airbnb | Senior Platform Engineer Jul 2014 - Feb 2016
Championed containerization initiative, containerizing 80 legacy monolithic applications using Docker, reducing deployment
time from 2 hours to 8 minutes and improving service reliability by 28%
Designed distributed configuration management system using Consul and custom Python tooling, serving 500+ service
instances and eliminating 73% of configuration-related production incidents
Owned platform security hardening initiative, implementing HashiCorp Vault for secrets management across infrastructure,
achieving zero unauthorized access incidents across 200+ production workloads
PROJECTS
Multi-Tenancy Kubernetes Platform Architecture | Kubernetes, Helm, Istio, Prometheus, Terraform 2022 - 2023
Architected isolated multi-tenancy model supporting 25+ independent customers with complete resource isolation and billing
metering, generating design patterns adopted company-wide
Implemented advanced networking and observability using Istio service mesh, reducing inter-service latency by 22% and
achieving 99.95% SLA across all customer environments
EXTRACURRICULAR
Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) | Kubernetes Community Contributor 2019 - Present
Contributed 15+ PRs to Kubernetes core networking and storage subsystems, with 8 merged contributions adopted in v1.24
and v1.25 releases
Organized quarterly CNCF Kubernetes workshops in Seattle, attracting 200+ attendees and establishing local community
chapter with 800+ members
DevOps Institute | Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA) Mentor 2020 - Present
Mentored 30+ engineers through CKA certification program, achieving 92% first-attempt pass rate compared to industry
average of 65%
Created comprehensive Kubernetes troubleshooting course adopted by 5 enterprise organizations
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Python, Bash, Go, YAML, HCL, SQL
Technologies – Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Ansible, AWS (EC2, ECS, Lambda, RDS), GCP (GKE, Cloud Run), Azure (AKS),
Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, Vault, ArgoCD
Tools – Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub Actions, CloudFormation, Helm, Datadog, PagerDuty, Consul, etcd, Kafka, RabbitMQ
name: Sven Kramer

projects.name: metering, generating design patterns adopted company-wide
